public_reputation: respected but feared for procedural severity
appearance: Cosmouth Gate Marshal 1 is visibly shaped by the work and status pressures of Tideglass Registry.
manner: controlled, observant, and economical with attention
daily_function: Maintains gate marshal responsibilities in and around Tideglass Registry.
hidden_pressure: Cosmouth Gate Marshal 1 is trying to hold local order together without publicly admitting how stretched it has become.
first_impression: Cosmouth Gate Marshal 1 quickly reads whether strangers are worth helping, charging, or slowing down.
what_they_want_from_strangers: clarity, usefulness, and respect for local process
how_they_create_problems: turning a small favor into an obligation or delay
escalation_if_crossed: brings scrutiny, reputational friction, and institutional attention
rumor_about_them: Locals say Cosmouth Gate Marshal 1 is more connected than seems safe.
best_first_scene: An arrival, delay, or access problem where practical guidance matters more than combat.
